parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json;
return { statusCode: input.statusCode || 400, body: input.body || { ok: false, error: 'Validation failed' } };

parameters.query:
WITH payload AS (
  SELECT
    NULLIF('{{ String($json.codigo_servico ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','') AS "codigo",
    NULLIF('{{ String($json.contas ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','') AS "contas",
    NULLIF('{{ String($json.boletos ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','') AS "boletos",
    NULLIF('{{ String($json.nota ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','') AS "nota",
    NULLIF('{{ String($json.cliente ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','') AS "cliente",
    NULLIF('{{ String($json.status ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','') AS "status",
    NULLIF('{{ String($json.vendedor ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','') AS "vendedor",
    NULLIF('{{ String($json.chave ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','') AS "chave",
    NULLIF('{{ String($json.numeronfs ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','') AS "numeronfs",
    NULLIF('{{ String($json.notarecibo ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','') AS "notarecibo",
    NULLIF('{{ String($json.vinculooscomnfs ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','') AS "vinculooscomnfs",
    CASE
      WHEN NULLIF('{{ String($json.runned ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','') ~ '^-?[0-9]+$'
      THEN NULLIF('{{ String($json.runned ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','')::integer
      ELSE NULL
    END AS "runned"
)
INSERT INTO auxiliary."NF_ServiceMetadata" (
  "codigo", "contas", "boletos", "nota", "cliente", "status",
  "vendedor", "chave", "numeronfs", "notarecibo", "vinculooscomnfs",
  "runned", "created_at", "updated_at"
)
SELECT
  p."codigo", p."contas", p."boletos", p."nota", p."cliente", p."status",
  p."vendedor", p."chave", p."numeronfs", p."notarecibo", p."vinculooscomnfs",
  p."runned",
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp,
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
FROM payload p
ON CONFLICT ("codigo")
DO UPDATE SET
  "contas" = EXCLUDED."contas",
  "boletos" = EXCLUDED."boletos",
  "nota" = EXCLUDED."nota",
  "cliente" = EXCLUDED."cliente",
  "status" = EXCLUDED."status",
  "vendedor" = EXCLUDED."vendedor",
  "chave" = EXCLUDED."chave",
  "numeronfs" = EXCLUDED."numeronfs",
  "notarecibo" = EXCLUDED."notarecibo",
  "vinculooscomnfs" = EXCLUDED."vinculooscomnfs",
  "runned" = EXCLUDED."runned",
  "updated_at" = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
WHERE
  "NF_ServiceMetadata"."contas" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."contas"
  OR "NF_ServiceMetadata"."boletos" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."boletos"
  OR "NF_ServiceMetadata"."nota" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."nota"
  OR "NF_ServiceMetadata"."cliente" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."cliente"
  OR "NF_ServiceMetadata"."status" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."status"
  OR "NF_ServiceMetadata"."vendedor" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."vendedor"
  OR "NF_ServiceMetadata"."chave" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."chave"
  OR "NF_ServiceMetadata"."numeronfs" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."numeronfs"
  OR "NF_ServiceMetadata"."notarecibo" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."notarecibo"
  OR "NF_ServiceMetadata"."vinculooscomnfs" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."vinculooscomnfs"
  OR "NF_ServiceMetadata"."runned" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."runned"
RETURNING "codigo", "numeronfs", "cliente", "status";
